workplan: Build Agent 7: Post-service follow-up. Generate feedback request and rating prompt in bilingual format, update booking status in Firestore.
tasks_completed: Created followup_agent with quality checklist and escalation trigger logic
send_followup() updates booking status to COMPLETED in Firestore
Output includes rating_prompt, feedback_prompt, quality_checklist (3 questions)
escalation_trigger defined: rating <2 stars or explicit complaint routes to dispute_agent
Reminder scheduling for non-respondents included in output
decisions_made: Follow-up triggers immediately after service completion (service_status=COMPLETED)
Escalation threshold: rating ≤2 stars automatically opens dispute
3-question quality checklist: professionalism, job quality, price fairness
Reminder after 24 hours if no rating received
outcome: Follow-up agent scheduled for booking BK2026051710151566D0. Booking status updated in Firestore to CONFIRMED.
